reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: I’m pleased with it
reviews.text: It’s a good tooth brush..it takes a little getting used to because I’m accustomed to a bigger brush head..but it works great.

reviews.title: Amazing Price and Works Great!
reviews.text:
First off, this toothbrush is so pretty. I ordered the Green, which is really a deep turquoise with attractive, shiny gold accents. It's lightweight but feels substantial, not at all cheap. It also comes with a whopping eight (8) brush heads, which is enough for 2 years. Amazing. I also really like the brush size. Many brushes are too big for adequate brushing, but this is a really nice size. The bristles are not overly stiff, so they don't irritate my gums.

Everything with this brush is powered by a single button, pushed multiple times to change modes and held down to turn off manually. Clean mode lasts 2 minutes with a pause every 30 seconds to change quadrants before finally turning off on its own. Additional modes are Polish (I googled to discover that this helps remove stains and shine teeth post brushing), Milder (for sensitive teeth), White (whitening), and Gum Care/Massage. Obviously, the vibration makes a sound, but it's on par with the loudness of other electric toothbrushes I have used

A really nice feature is that this does not require a separate charging base. The charging cord is built right into the base (which means you cannot lose it) and accessed by twisting and removing the gold piece at the bottom, and it plugs into any USB port. When charging is complete, the USB sticks back into a slot, and the base twists back on. A full charge is expected to last 45 days, though I haven't had it long enough to know if that pans out yet!

Overall, this is a high-quality electric toothbrush that has everything you could possibly need. I'm really happy with it.

reviews.title: Vibrates vigorously
reviews.text: This toothbrush is charged by a USB cord that comes from the bottom.  Its cord is approximately 3.5 inches.  When it is charging, it blinks red and then goes to solid red when fully charged.  It comes with 8 brushes and has 5 settings. It took me a little bit to get used to because it vibrates more than any toothbrush I have ever used.  I guess that is why it is called a sonic toothbrush.  After using it several times I am now used to it, and it does do a very good job at cleaning my teeth.  I have been using it about a week and so far, I only charged it the one time.

reviews.title: Convenient
reviews.text: I was interested to try these toothbrushes because I thought they might be good for camping, travel, etc. I have used a couple of them and I will definitely use the rest, but I probably won't purchase them in the future. The design seems a bit wasteful/odd, as the handle is quite thick and sturdy but rather short. It is hard for me to keep my grip as I brush because the handle is so short, and my hands are not even that big. I feel like I don't get as good of a cleaning/scrubbing because of the short handle. I think the manufacturer could make the handle a little less thick, but longer. I think it would be more effective if that were the case. Also, the taste is pretty bland and it doesn't leave a "fresh" taste (like a fresh minty taste) in my mouth. I know my teeth are probably clean, but it just doesn't feel or taste like I'm getting as good of a cleaning as I do with my regular-sized toothbrush and minty toothpaste. For a one or two day trip, they would be fine, but for anything longer, I'd want to bring a standard toothbrush.

reviews.title: They’re ok…
reviews.text: Of the many compatible replacement heads I’ve tried, this set isn’t my favorite. It doesn’t feel as sturdy as some of the other brands I’ve tried, and rattles a bit. But it does work.

reviews.title: Make my Sonicare ineffective
reviews.text:
The toothbrush heads I received have yellow bristles in place of the advertised green. The color doesn’t matter much to me, but I’m curious if the yellow will work the way the green do and give an indication it’s time to change the brush head? Time will tell.

While I don’t mind the color, I do mind the fact that these brush heads don’t do the same sort of job brushing as do the name brand, or even other non-name brand replacements I’ve used. They fit on my Sonicare brush okay, but when I use it, it doesn’t vibrate nearly as fast or feel like it’s cleaning my teeth the way it should. While using it, I had to fight the urge to start brushing like I would with a manual toothbrush since I didn’t feel like it was doing much of anything to clean my teeth. My Sonicare seems sort of weak and ineffective with this head attached, and it’s not the Sonicare itself, because when I put the old brush head back on, it worked as expected.

reviews.title: Just as good as the name brand!
reviews.text: These replacement toothbrush heads are just as good as the Philips Sonicare ones I've bought in the past. If I closed my eyes I wouldn't know the difference. I'm definitely buying these again, plus they are close to half the price!

reviews.title: Functional And Sturdy
reviews.text: These replacement heads for Sonicare E-Series Toothbrushes arrived individually wrapped.  All of the plastic surfaces are smooth and finished.  The bristles are smooth.  They fit my Sonicare Essence perfectly, and screwed on to the handle easily.  The head of the brush is small, and fits into the back corners of my mouth easily.  They clean my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement heads, for a considerably lower price.  I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Best Sonicare Replacement Heads Yet!
reviews.text: To be fair, this is the second brand I've ever tried, but still, significantly better! Reason one, these are infinitely less expensive than the Up and Up brand replacements, I bought a few years ago. I only received 3 heads for $30, compared to the 6 I received with this brand for $20. Reason two is the fit. The Up and Up brand heads weren't a perfect fit and chattered like crazy whenever I used them, which was less than ideal. These new heads are as silent as the original Sonicare head was out of the box. If you need to switch out your old worn-out head, save yourself some time and money and give these a try.

title: Pyhralke Schallcare Replacement Brush Heads Fit for Braun Oral b, Precision Heads Compatible with Oral-B Pro1000/9600/5000/3000/1500/Genius and Smart Electric Toothbrush(4pcs)
features: Compatible with Oral-B , Deep Sweep, SmartSeries, ProSeries, Triumph, Advance Power, ProfessionalCare, ProfessionalCare SmartSeries, Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality CrossAction, Vitality Precision Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Sensitive, Vitality TriZone.(Attention: DO NOT compatible with oral b io)

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

Safe, healthy, and durable. Made with soft and flexible DuPont bristles and approved to meet official dental health and safety standards. At the same time, the production of brush heads uses a unique process technique, which greatly enhances the durability of the toothbrush head.

The slightly longer bristles at both ends are designed to easily clean the oral blind area--every side of the innermost teeth, also clean the gap of teeth, for comprehensive cleaning, fresh breath, prevention of tooth decay.

The soft to middle bristles protect teeth from harmful hard brushes and offer a more comfortable cleaning, better for your teeth and gum health. Side-to-side bristles sweep away plaque while the moving power tip penetrates hard to reach areas and fixed filaments help to whiten the enamel, reaching the most difficult areas.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

reviews.title: if it fits handle
reviews.text: works well

reviews.title: Good price
reviews.text: Very satisfied with the replacement brushes

reviews.title: Replacement tooth brush at great price.
reviews.text: Same quality as the original brush but much cheaper price

title: Oral B Compatible Replacement Brush Heads- Holiday Pack of 16 Double Clean, Cross, Floss, and Precise Oralb Braun Compatible Electric Toothbrush Parts- Fits Oral-B Kids, Pro 1000 + More!
features: VARIETY PACK OF 16 ORAL B BRAUN REPLACEMENT BRUSH HEADS- Includes 4 Double brushes, 4 Cross Brushes, 4 Precision brushes and 4 Floss Clean brushes. Try out all these unique oralb compatible replacements and find the one you’ll love!
FLOSS ORAL-B ELECTRIC TOOTHBRUSH HEAD- Gives the whole mouth a floss-like cleaning, including the interdental spaces; and removes plaque. Our advanced bristles are designed for superior clean.
CROSS ORALB GENERIC REPLACEMENT BRUSHES- Have perfectly angled bristles which levels & cover more surface to reach and remove more plaque.
DOUBLE CLEAN HEADS- Twice the cleaning action with 2 simultaneously moving brushes, which oscillate, pulsate and rotate to provide better teeth hygiene.
PRECISION STYLE HEADS- These electric toothbrush heads provide similar brushing motion of a manual toothbrush, but remove 100% more plaque.

QUALITY AND CONVENIENCE WHILE YOU SAVE $$$$$$$!- All replacement brush heads come with color coded bands so you can share this bulk package with everyone! Save time and money with our family sized pack of brush heads compatible with MOST oral b electric toothbrushes (excluding the Sonic, Pulsonic and battery powered brushes that use ONE AA battery).

reviews.title: Worked Great!
reviews.text: I have the kids Oral -B toothbrushes. I opened every pack and checked the fit for each one. They all worked perfectly. They look and feel the same as the original brand. Great deal!

reviews.title: Definitely a great purchase
reviews.text: Value for money.

reviews.title: Poor quality
reviews.text: The inside pocket that mounts to the keyed shaft strips and the head no longer rotates. So these have a short lifespan.

reviews.title: Works as well as name brand
reviews.text: Surprisingly loved the double head brushes. My teeth feel extra clean.

reviews.title: Not the real thing!
reviews.text:
I thought I would it leash get the same reminder of fading bristles. These brush heads pinch the inside of lips and doesn't have fading bristles to remind about changing to new toothbrush.
I won't use this seller again.

title: Milos Electric Toothbrush Replacement Heads for Kids, Oral B Compatible Pack of 16, Extra Soft Bristles, Fits for Electric Braun Brush Heads, Refill for Vitality Precision Sensitive and Clean Triumph
features: Compatible - Our toothbrush head set is versatile and compatible with most Braun and Oral B toothbrushes (excluding Oral B Pulsonic and iO).
Professional - Show those pearly whites with confidence! The flexible DuPont bristles on our toothbrush replacement brush heads are designed to remove plaque and promote healthy gums.
Convenient - Each brush on our kid toothbrush head replacement set has a color-coded ring at the bottom to make differentiation easy for the whole family.
Fading Bristles - Take the guesswork out of your hygiene routine. The colored bristles on these toothbrush refills fade to let you know when it's time for a replacement.
Pack Includes - This electric toothbrush head set comes with 16 replacements to make sure you stay on top of your oral health.

reviews.title: I just got it so I can't comment on durability, but...
reviews.text: This is much less expensive than Oral B brush heads. I contacted Oral B to tell them I thought their brush heads are exorbitantly priced, but they blamed it on supply chain issues. So apparently Milos is somehow not affected by supply chain issues. It kinda makes it seem like Oral B's response was B.S. Anyway, these heads I bought fit my Oral B ProHealth toothbrush. It's kind of weird that the bristles aren't all flush with one another, but they seem to work fine. I don't care that the colors don't match with the toothbrush body.

reviews.title: Cheap off brand
reviews.text: You will go through these fast as they seem to wear down super quick. They came fast and were cheap I need them quick as we ran out but I won't order them again.

title: mushie Baby Finger Toothbrush (Tradewinds/Stone) 2-Pack
features: Help brushing go smoothly and begin building good habits with our silicone baby finger toothbrushes.
Designed in Sweden and made of soft, food-grade silicone, they slip onto your fingertip so you can gently clean your baby's teeth without irritating gums.
Hand wash in warm water. Replace every 3-4 months.
Caution: Not a toy. Adult supervision required under 3 years of age. Do not leave a child unattended with this product.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

reviews.title: Great Product, easy to use!
reviews.text: My baby girl loved this toothbrush! It made brushing her teeth so easy and she loved it! She had so much fun brushing her teeth!

reviews.title: A little large but overall good
reviews.text: These are a little large for 0-3 months but overall easy use, clean and very soft.

reviews.title: love these
reviews.text: Real cute, nice that they come in a two pack

title: Oral-B Stages Power Kids Disney Frozen Battery Toothbrush with Timer App

Dentists recommend replacing your toothbrush every 3 months, or when bristles are faded and worn, for a better clean Safety Warning Periodically check the cord for damage.

If the cord is damaged, take the charging unit to an Oral-B Braun Service Centre. A damaged or non-functioning unit must no longer be used. Not intended for use by children under age of 3 years.

Children should be supervised to ensure they do not play with the appliance. If the product is dropped, the brush head should be replaced before the next use, even if no damage is visible.

Use this product only for its intended use as described. Do not use attachments which are not recommended by the manufacturer. If you are undergoing treatment for any oral care condition, consult your dental professional prior to use.

features: Designed to help children brush teeth longer and better - appropriate for children aged 3 years +
The rotating brush head has a raised center row to clean chewing surfaces where cavities tend to form
Ergonomic handle designed for children’s small hands
Power battery toothbrush
Assorted models
Oral-B Toothbrush

reviews.title: Edit: Good for my 2 year old
reviews.text:
I realize it says it's a kids toothbrush but it's huge! It's bigger than a regular sized brush for adults. I intended this for my 2 year old for Christmas. It's my fault for not looking at details. I've been searching for an Olaf one and this was on sale. I have not tried it but will update when we do...

Update: I gave this to my daughter early because she saw Olaf. It does fit in her mouth and the on/off buttons are easy for her to push. It's her favorite color, purple. She actually brushes her teeth. Well the toothbrush does the work! I don't see a timer on it. So far, the battery is doing fine. My biggest concern is replacing the head. It's already looking like I should replace.

title: WOSUK Sonic Electric Toothbrushes, Sonic Electric Toothbrushes Travel-Friendly Design 4 Modes 16 Gears with 4 Brush Heads USB Fast Charge Built-in Smart Timer for Adults and Kids
description:
4 Modes Design(Each mode has four intensity adjustments)
1.Four-gear(weak, medium, strong, stronger) cleaning mode(Clean)about 32,000 times/minute, through the soundwave toothbrush high-frequency vibration, thoroughly clean teeth, completely clean eacharea of the mouth, generally normal use of this mode. 2.Four-gear(weak, medium, strong, stronger) sens ive mode(Milder)about 35,000 times/minute, the first use of sonic toothbrushes, it is recommended to use this mode. Toothache and tooth allergies use thispattern to make teeth more comfortable. 3.Four-gear(weak, medium, strong, stronger) white mode(White) about38,000 to 45,000 times/minute, a variety of frequency mode operation,more effective to go tea stains, tobacco stains, dental plaque, this modefor people with higher needs design. 4.Four-gear(weak, medium, strong, stronger) gum health mode (Mas care) about 31,000 to 46,000 times/minute, high-frequency rhythmic shock, improve coffee stains, tobacco stains, tea stains, suitable for stubborn dental stains people to use.
Note: This machine has a memory function to automatically savethe last used gear
Power/Mode:
1. Press the power button, continucus press to shift among modes(press within 2s) 2. Each mode has 4 intensity adjustments(press within 2s) 3. Press the power button, press again after 3-4s use to turn off.
2 Minute Smart Timer
2 Mins Smart Timer & Along lasting Battery Life - Built-in Timer with 2 mins auto shut-off and  interval pause of reminding to change brushing areas every 30s helps to give you a total mouth clean,  With this brush you will improve your oral health easily. Designed with USB fast charging system.
Package Includes:
1 x Electric Toothbrush 4 x Replacement toothbrush heads 1 x Charging Cable without Adapter 1 x Instruction Manual
features: 46,000 Strokes Per Min with Sonic Technology & The advanced sonic technology delivers a high-speed vibration to efficiently remove up to 300% more stains. 4 modes of whiten, clean, sensitive, polish and massage (Each mode has 4 vibration intensities) to meet different oral needs and best fit your brushing aims.

2 Mins Smart Timer & Along lasting Battery Life - Built-in Timer with 2 mins auto shut-off and interval pause of reminding to change brushing areas every 30s helps to give you a total mouth clean, With this brush you will improve your oral health easily. Designed with USB fast charging system.

Comes with 4 replacement brush heads to avoid order new replacement brush heads frequently. The bristles are made with DUPONT nylon, "W" shape design to suit teeth topography for thorough cleaning of gums and hard to reach areas.

Sleek Lightweight Design & IPX 8 Waterproof Rating- These stylish toothbrushes are made for home or travel! It is very easy and convenient to pack them in your travel bag with brush head protective covers included. With them being waterproof feel free to use them in the shower.

Get a full days use from only one 5 minute charge. Get over 30 days use from only one full charge of 2 hours. with low battery reminding and automatically cuts off power after full charge. Also, IPX8 waterproof to be used at bath and shower. No worry about the water would enter the charge ports to short the battery life, More safer than USB charger.

reviews.title: a mouthful of noise.
reviews.text: I thank for the money I guess it's alright. It's very inexpensive. The drawback is very noisy and in your mouth that might not be a good posy. Thank you. God bless you and may the rest of your life be the best of your life.  OZ

reviews.title: Noisy
reviews.text: This toothbrush is fine. It cleans teeth well and is a reasonable price. It comes with 4 toothbrush heads (2 are in the little box with the charger). It charges via USB and has to be laid on its side to charge, which is a bit of a bummer especially considering there is no cover for the toothbrush heads. It doesn't arrive charged. It charges in a couple of hours. It's noisier than other electric toothbrushes we've used. You hear a constant beeping while you brush. Overall, it's okay, but I would recommend a different product if price isn't an issue.

title: Ooak Toothbrush, Tapered V++Max Soft Bristles, 4 Pack
description: Ooak 4 pack Standard V++ Max Light - Multiple ColorsTapered V++Max bristles offer a unique design that simultaneously cleans teeth and removes plaque along the gum line. Outer bristles are positioned to gently stimulate gums for an overall healthier mouth. Dental Professional Recommended
features: Ergonomic bristles clean teeth and gums simultaneously
Reduces plaque and cleans the gum line
Tapered bristles
45 Degree Outer Bristles
BPA Free

reviews.title: Huge Brush Head, Might Take Some Getting Used To.
reviews.text: I got these in the mail today and am mixed on them.  For one, I was instructed to do more brushing along the gum line for gum health, so these seem perfect.  I also really like that they are super soft bristles and are pretty gentle on that gum line, however, the brush head is huge and takes a little getting used to.  I have a big mouth and kind of wonder how this would work on a child or petit adult.  I was very happy with the brushing I got and I think I will be using these brushes exclusively in the coming months and will see how they went, once the coronavirus lockdown is over and dentists are back to work.

reviews.title: Very cute
reviews.text:
These were very cute!

I was pleased with these toothbrushes. I think they did a good job at getting my daughter's teeth cleaned. They felt good in her mouth. I thought they worked well.

I have been happy with this brand. We have bought dental products for a long time. They were easy to use. Teeth felt good after it. They last a while. They are a quality product. I would recommend it.

reviews.title: Will Take Getting Used To...
reviews.text: I was interested in trying out these toothbrushes, which I've had recommended to me by a couple of friends.  They're definitely weird in the beginning.  When you're used to a bit of coverage as you brush, having the thin strip down the middle and then on either side is a little odd.  I kept feeling like I had to rotate the brush more, which. might be a good thing?  It seems to clean as well as my normal toothbrush, but it is going to take time to be comfortable with.

reviews.title: Great beginner toothbrush
reviews.text: Great beginner toothbrush! The bristles are really soft so great for someone just getting started. I used one in my almost 5 yr old and the other on my almost 2 year old. Both worked great and were soft enough for them.

reviews.title: Super soft!
reviews.text: I have a niece that hates brushing, and doing so is a pain. The design of this is unique. It has a V shaped head to reach the teeth and gums at the same time. Comes in a pack of 2 so the two will last six months. Has a wider handles for little hands.

title: oogiebear 360° Toothbrush - Training Toothbrush for Babies. Safe Ultra Soft Silicone Toothbrush with Teddy Bear Baby Gum Relief and Gum Massaging Base. Baby Must Haves. BPA Free
features: MAKES BRUSHING SAFE AND BEAR-ABLE - oogiebear’s adorable and innovative baby toothbrush provides better baby oral care and makes brushing tiny teeth fun with a soft bristle brush and bear head design that ensures it never goes in too deep.

FUN AND FUNCTIONAL DESIGN - oogiebear’s unique 360 degree toothbrush effectively cleans teeth and gums with short soft bristles. The soft silicone base is easy for baby to hold while premium grade silicone bumps stimulate gums.

BABY’S FIRST TOOTHBRUSH - Made for babies 3 months and older, oogiebear toothbrush is the perfect tool to get your baby used to brushing before graduating to their first big-kid toothbrush. Its stand-up base makes it easy to clean and store.

SUPERIOR QUALITY - oogiebear toothbrush is made with the highest quality food-grade silicone. Its extra-soft bristles are fun to chew and won’t break off or cause choking while its base has a silky touch that’s soothing to gums.

DOCTOR DESIGNED, MOM TESTED, PERIODONTIST APPROVED - Created by a registered pharmacist and mother and periodontist dad, oogiebear toothbrush is designed to make learning to brush easier for parents and baby for a lifetime of bright beautiful smiles.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: It was a gift to my nieces son. She said he loves it. He’s only 6 months but it’s never too early to teach. She said he won’t let it go.

reviews.title: Well designed kids toothbrush
reviews.text: Very useful toothbrush. I got it for my 8 month old who already has a few teeth. I love the design. It is relatively large, which makes it easier to my baby to hold and shew in. Since the brush is round, it works from all angles. I highly recommend it.

title: Kids U-Shaped Toothbrush, Food Grade Soft Silicone Brush Head, U-Type Toothbrush Whole Mouth with Handle for Kids, 360°Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Toddlers and Children, Heart Shape 2-6 Ages
description: Kids U-Shaped Toothbrush, Food Grade Soft Silicone Brush Head, U-Type Toothbrush Whole Mouth Toothbrush with Handle for Kids, 360°Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Toddlers and Children
features: COMFORT AND SAFETY: The easy-grip handle provides comfort and security, making it easier for toddlers to hold their own toothbrushes. Two lovely colors increase your child's interest in brushing and have fun while brushing.
INNOVATIVE U-SHAPED DESIGN: Ergonomic U-shaped brush head that fits the shape and mechanics of children's tooth structure. Specifically designed for children's delicate gums and sensitive teeth.

360° FULL CLEANING: The 360° full cleaning brush head, soft nipple-grade silicone, provides a comfortable brushing feel and cleans your teeth properly without twisting your wrist. Effective deep cleaning without damaging gums and protecting children's enamel.
CUTE DESIGN: This cute U-shaped manual kids toothbrush is designed to make brushing for kids (2-6 years old) more fun and easy. Let your child try it once and he or she will love this toothbrush.
PACKAGE INCLUDES: pink toothbrush*1, blue toothbrush*1, saliva towel*1. After receiving the product, if you have any questions or concerns, please contact us so we can help.

reviews.title: great deal
reviews.text: Really cannot pick because of the price. Item as described and came with a very simple bib. These work as awesome teethers for my twins but in order to make it work for toothbrushing independence, you do need a cooperative toddler who's willing to bite down and keep the teeth between the brushes. If your kids are willing to bite down and brush with these, they work great for encouraging toddlers to maintain healthy dental hygiene. I think it's already awesome for the price and works great as a teether.
